title: Wax Lyrical Winter Warmer Reed Diffuser 100ml | Spiced Cinnamon Scent| Warming & Spicy
features: ALL WRAPPED UP – Fill your home with the comforting, nostalgic aromas of winter and Christmas with this rich, softly spiced gourmand fragranced reed diffuser.
WINTER WARMER: A rich festive fragrance with warm notes of roasted cinnamon, spiced clove and comforting sweet vanilla.

MADE IN THE UK – We've been manufacturing candles, reed diffusers and more from our home in Cumbria for over 40 years. As a responsible manufacturer we know how important it is to manage our impact on the environment – that's why we have an on-site wind turbine that provides clean and renewable energy to our factory site and offices.

HOW TO USE – To experience this warm, rich fragrance add your reeds and set your glass diffuser on a stable and suitable surface, out of the reach of children and pets, and enjoy as the fragrance fills your space. Wash hands and quickly wipe up any spills to avoid marking.

Christmas home fragrance collection from Wax Lyrical incorporating illustrations of a snow-covered village brought to life with shimmering foil accents. An ideal fragranced gift for friends and family. Seasonal scent—once it’s gone, it’s gone!
description: Product Description Indulge in the comforting scent of this Wax Lyrical Winter Warmer Reed Diffuser. A deliciously rich, festive fragrance, it contains a warm blend of roasted cinnamon, spiced clove and sweet vanilla and is perfect for kicking back and relaxing. Encased in a red-wrapped glass bottle and packaged in a matching box, this diffuser would make a lovely gift. Directions Add reeds to the diffuser, place it on a stable surface out of reach of children and pets, enjoy the fragrance, wash hands, and wipe up any spills to avoid marking. Safety Warning To experience this warm, rich fragrance add your reeds and set your glass diffuser on a stable and suitable surface, out of the reach of children and pets, and enjoy as the fragrance fills your space. Wash hands and quickly wipe up any spills to avoid marking. See more
